title: Gnephosis eriocarpa
taxonomy: Gnephosis eriocarpa is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is native to Western Australia. As a member of the Boraginaceae family, it is part of the larger group of flowering plants known as angiosperms. The Boraginaceae family consists of about 2,000 species, which are found in many parts of the world.
